@if (showForm()) {

Vendor Backstage

Create a new organisation and send an activation link to the first Director.

@if (errorMessage()) {
{{ errorMessage() }}
}
@if (form.controls.name.invalid && form.controls.name.touched) {
@if (form.controls.name.errors?.['required']) { Organisation name is required. } @if (form.controls.name.errors?.['maxlength']) { Organisation name is too long (256 characters max). }
}
@if (form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.invalid && form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.touched) {
@if (form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.errors?.['required']) { Director email is required. } @if (form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.errors?.['email']) { Please enter a valid email address. } @if (form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.errors?.['maxlength']) { Email is too long. }
}
} @else {

Activation Link Sent

{{ successMessage() }}

}
